text.title: Change Control Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply Change Control end-to-end. Each step names input, action, output, and decision-gate.

step.name: log-cr
step.action: Append draft row to register with id, requester, timestamp.

step.name: impact-analysis
step.decision-gate: If any delta unestimable, route to tier-3 for expert analysis.

step.name: tier-routing
step.action: Route to tier-1/2/3 based on cost+schedule impact bands.
step.decision-gate: If cost_delta_pct > 10%, escalate to tier-3 regardless of other factors.

step.name: decision
step.decision-gate: If approved AND scope_delta touches frozen contract clause, re-route to legal.

step.name: re-baseline
step.action: Re-version baseline; record CR id; archive old baseline.
step.decision-gate: If re-baseline conflicts with EVM cycle, batch CRs at period boundary.
